The Civic Hour

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a teacher. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What was Mr. Asante's main point about the Supreme Court?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Listen again. Why does the teacher talk about other countries?
